FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Scott Hodges (Trustee).

Mr. Schultz stated that they were delayed by the Accountant and that they want to roll in a preliminary distribution to get distribution/gifts to the Nephews and the Nieces. The Court informed Counsel that it would like to see CUTMA accounts in California in federally insured blocked bank accounts for the Minors. The accounting status hearing was continued to October 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Continued To Sep-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for (trustee) Scott Hodges.

Mr. Schultz stated that he needed a little more time to do the accounting and that he just got the schedules last week. The status of the accounting was continued to September 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Aug-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property)
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $5,250,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $4,988,000.00 is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (450 Liberty Terrace #4, San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $2,014,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 2, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,914,000.00 is required. Mr. Schultz stated that the three purchasers are taking as joint tenants.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Trusts Two Parcels Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The Petition for Authority to List and Sell Trusts Two Parcels of Real Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
